core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Cyber-Security meets Swiss Precision
Density is King: Network engineers need data, not whitespace
Dark Mode Default: Optimized for NOC (Network Operations Center) screens
Visual Feedback: Color = Status (Green is good, Red is panic)

usage_rules: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for ALL numeric data: IP addresses, Latency (ms), Packet Loss %, MTR Hops.
Use 'Chivo' for page titles and widget headers.
Use 'Inter' for UI labels, settings, and help text.

accessibility.rule: Ensure APCA contrast compliance. Text on 'danger' backgrounds must be white or very dark shade.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-all shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)]
buttons.destructive: bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90 h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(239,68,68,0.5)]
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md

cards.base: rounded-lg border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm

tables.header: h-10 px-2 text-left align-middle font-medium text-muted-foreground [&:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0

inputs.base: flex h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

animations.ping_status: animate-ping absolute inline-flex h-full w-full rounded-full opacity-75

images.description: Abstract server rack lights, use for login page background or subtle overlay.
Abstract streaks of purple/green light. Good for hero sections or empty states.
Computer screen code. Use for 'Settings' or 'API' documentation visual.
Digital neural network. Use for 'Topology' or 'Route' visualization concepts.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 for normal text. Use 'text-white' on colored badges.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring with 'ring-2 ring-primary' is mandatory for keyboard nav.
accessibility.aria: All graphs must have tabular data alternatives or 'aria-label' descriptions.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME: Implement DARK MODE by default. Do not create a light mode toggle unless strictly necessary. The user asked for a 'dark theme, professional dashboard'.
2. LAYOUT: Use the 'Bento Grid' for the main dashboard. It should feel like a cockpit.
3. DATA: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all IP addresses and Latency numbers. This is non-negotiable for a network tool.
4. GRAPHS: Use 'Recharts'. Style them to look like Grafana (dark background, neon lines, grid lines visible but subtle).
5. STATUS: Use the 'ping_status' animation on the dashboard for any agent that is 'DOWN'.
6. TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to every interactive element (buttons, inputs, grid rows).
7. TABLE: For the Agent List, use a dense table (compact padding) because users might have 20-50 servers.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop' (generic centered layouts, gradients everywhere).
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Do NOT apply universal transition 'transition: all'.
Do NOT center align the app container.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable for containers, but TIGHT spacing for data tables.
